title: Interface Impl
description: Implement an implicit interface to ensure a class provides specific methods.
problemStatement:
In Dart, every class is an implicit interface! Create a class `Shape` with a `void draw()` method. Then, create a class `Circle` that `implements Shape`.

**Requirement:** You MUST provide an implementation for `draw()` in the `Circle` class.

**Expected Output:** `Drawing a circle`.
hints: The `implements` keyword requires you to define all methods of the interface class.
